pre_fix_failure_evidence: applyAudioMixerUpdates swallowed errors for non-Restore contexts (reportUserError called, no throw)
scheduleVolumeUpdate dispatched 'unmute' before write completed (fire-and-forget void call)
post_fix_pass_evidence: applyAudioMixerUpdates now rethrows for Volume/Mute/Unmute contexts
runUpdate only dispatches 'unmute' after confirmed write; skips on failure or stale token
handleToggleMute mute path dispatches 'mute' only after write succeeds

pre_fix_failure_evidence: isSongCategory guard at usePlaybackController.ts:~310 blocked auto-advance arming for prg/crt/disk
post_fix_pass_evidence: isSongCategory guard removed; resolvedDuration check now arms guard for all file types

pre_fix_failure_evidence: No sweep mechanism existed; highlights stuck indefinitely when timer starved by main-thread stall or background suspension
No timestamp on highlight elements; impossible to detect stale highlights
post_fix_pass_evidence: CTA_HIGHLIGHT_SET_AT_ATTR written on every setTapFlash call
sweepStaleHighlights() removes highlights older than CTA_HIGHLIGHT_MAX_AGE_MS (2000 ms)
registerGlobalButtonInteractionModel wires sweep to visibilitychange and window focus

pre_fix_failure_evidence: hvscArchiveExtraction.ts accumulated all extracted entries before processing (peak memory proportional to archive size)
extracted[] array held all decompressed bytes in memory simultaneously
post_fix_pass_evidence: extractZip refactored to streaming entry-by-entry processing; no accumulated array

pre_fix_failure_evidence: Same root cause as Issue 4: full in-memory extraction buffer
WRITE_CHUNK_SIZE_BYTES = 0x10000 (64 KiB): single oversized write caused device instability
writeFullImage wrote entire 64 KiB in one request; no chunking
post_fix_pass_evidence: tests/unit/ramOperations.test.ts: 12 tests pass (stale assertions updated to 16-chunk)
writeFullImage delegates to writeRanges; writeRanges accepts optional onRetry callback
